outputs: Room 19.0: booked by Office of Inherited Silences until previous notice.
Known forms: Form D-17(b), Form PI-3, Form HA-9
Return path cannot be calculated while the route remembers you arriving.
warnings: If the response includes water, assume facilities jurisdiction unless the water is standing in a room that has been administratively removed.
The operator should read the output only once. A second reading may produce a different room but the same filing requirement.
If any sample output appears to know your route home, stop reading and submit the page face-down.
